title: Inventory lead exposure data sources for LMIC cities
outcome: A dated source inventory separating industrial data, satellite imagery, blood-lead studies, exposure pathway studies, and unusable sources.
expected_artifact: datasets.md update plus evidence.json records for each accepted source.
validation_method: Reviewer checks each listed source for URL, date, access status, license, geographic grain, and limitations.
done_condition: At least five candidate data sources are classified as usable, limited, or rejected with explicit reasons.

title: Build spatial inventory of lead risk factors in candidate LMIC cities
outcome: A reproducible spatial inventory of known lead risk factors at neighborhood scale for at least two candidate LMIC cities.
expected_artifact: datasets.md update with risk factor spatial inventory.
validation_method: Replicator confirms risk factor classification methodology and verifies spatial inventory against published sources.
done_condition: At least two candidate cities have a documented spatial risk factor inventory with source and classification methodology.

title: Produce neighborhood-scale lead risk factor proximity map
outcome: A reproducible neighborhood-scale risk map that combines proximity to known lead sources with population data, at block or neighborhood grain.
expected_artifact: outputs.md update with risk map specification, color scale, and limitation statement.
validation_method: Validate risk map against available blood-lead measurements, report correlation and error characteristics, then replicate against independent blood-lead data.
done_condition: Risk map includes validation against blood-lead data where available, explicit uncertainty communication, and non-stigmatization guardrails.

title: Validate risk map against available blood-lead measurements
outcome: A validation report comparing neighborhood risk scores to published blood-lead measurements, with correlation, sensitivity, and specificity.
expected_artifact: validation.md update with validation results table.
validation_method: Replicator reruns validation and confirms correlation and error characteristics within reported tolerance.
done_condition: Validation includes sensitivity, specificity, area under curve, and explicit statement of where blood-lead data was unavailable.

title: Red-team harmful interpretations of lead risk maps
outcome: A failure-mode review identifying how risk maps could cause stigmatization, displacement, property devaluation, or discriminatory screening.
expected_artifact: outputs.md and SAFETY.md linked review note.
validation_method: Reviewer confirms every high-risk failure mode has a mitigation or blocks publication, then a second reviewer replicates the failure-mode check.
done_condition: Every risk map includes explicit non-stigmatization language, identifies communities that could be harmed, and blocks publication if harm cannot be mitigated.

title: Check whether risk maps match public-health decision needs
outcome: A field-facing review of whether the risk map would change any real public-health decision responsibly.
expected_artifact: playbooks.md update with use and non-use guidance.
validation_method: Field reviewer identifies the actual decision, user, timing, and misuse risk for the output, then a second reviewer replicates the non-use-case check.
done_condition: The output has a named user, named decision, explicit non-use cases including community protection safeguards, and replicated field-reality review before publication.
